class \mbox{\hyperlink{classGreenFHom3DPer}{Green\+FHom3\+DPer}}
\begin{DoxyCompactList}\small\item\em Base class for homogeneous 3D Green\textquotesingle{}s functions with lattice periodicity. \end{DoxyCompactList}\end{DoxyCompactItemize}


\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Periodic homogeneous 3D Green\textquotesingle{}s function (abstract base). 

This interface extends \doxylink{classGreenFHom3D}{Green\+FHom3D} to handle {\bfseries{Bloch‑periodic}} media in a homogeneous background. Concrete subclasses implement the lattice geometry (primitive cell mapping) and the periodic summation strategy (e.\+g. Ewald splitting in real/reciprocal space).

Key ideas\+:
\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item Fields satisfy Floquet–\+Bloch condition with wavevector {\bfseries{k}} (a.\+k.\+a. Bloch vector). Periodic images are accumulated with phase factors exp(i k·R).
\item Convergence is typically accelerated with {\bfseries{Ewald}} splitting; {\ttfamily evaluation\+Terms} and {\ttfamily e} control how many terms and the splitting strength.
\item {\ttfamily Primitive\+Cell()} maps any lattice vector to a canonical representative of the primitive cell.
\end{DoxyItemize}

\begin{DoxyWarning}{Warning}
This class is {\bfseries{abstract}}\+: {\ttfamily Primitive\+Cell()} is pure virtual. 
\end{DoxyWarning}
